scripts.generate:gallery: mkdir -p docs/.vuepress/public/gallery && php examples/calculator.php web > docs/.vuepress/public/gallery/calculator.html && php examples/counter.php html > docs/.vuepress/public/gallery/counter.html && php examples/todo.php html > docs/.vuepress/public/gallery/todo.html && php examples/pry.php web > docs/.vuepress/public/gallery/pry.html && php examples/showcase.php web > docs/.vuepress/public/gallery/showcase.html
scripts.docs:build: npm run generate:gallery && vuepress build docs
scripts.docs:clean: rimraf docs/.vuepress/.temp docs/.vuepress/.cache docs/.vuepress/.temp docs/.vuepress/dist docs/.vuepress/public/gallery
